starting_commit_subject: test(workflow): align public pricing offer build 224
blocker_detail: No blocker. The human-takeover columns are not applied to live schema, but every code path that needs them is gated behind HUMAN_TAKEOVER_SCHEMA_READY (default false), so no runtime failure is possible pre-migration. Routes are mounted and return a documented 503 schema_not_applied (writes) / empty 200 placeholder (pending-review) until the gate is enabled.
runtime_dependence_detail: evaluateSmsSafety + planner: pure boolean input, default false, behavior unchanged. dry-run executor: requests needs_human_takeover ONLY when humanTakeoverSchemaReady=true; default projection is byte-identical to today. lead-takeover service + route + dashboard pendingReview: return schema_not_applied / empty placeholder without querying new columns until the gate is enabled.

columns: needs_human_takeover boolean NOT NULL DEFAULT false
proposed_schema_not_applied.index: idx_leads_pending_review ON leads (roofer_id, human_takeover_at DESC) WHERE needs_human_takeover = true

endpoint_auth: existing dashboard token pattern (x-dashboard-access-token / ?token -> sha256 -> roofers.dashboard_access_token_hash, dashboard_access_enabled=true); ownership verified before mutation; 404 for non-owned lead; 401 for bad/missing token

alert_copy.template: RoofLeadHQ: Hot lead needs review — [name], [issue summary], [area]. Reply or open dashboard.

verification.human_takeover_service_unit_test: PASS (9 checks; schema gate, takeover/release/markHandled, idempotency, ownership 404, phone masking, no SMS/messages access)
verification.human_takeover_gate_verifier: PASS (4 checks; safety gate human_takeover skip, dispatcher skip-when-taken-over + unchanged-when-gate-off, M4 internal-only fail-closed, non-mutating git-status before==after)
verification.safe_readiness_fast_lane: PASS (17 checks, includes backend build + live_automation disabled for sms/calendar/vapi_outbound/resend/lindy + no schema/RLS markers in backend/src)
verification.safe_readiness_full_source_of_truth_lane: PASS (229 checks, 0 failures, exit 0; includes backend build)
